sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106494" key="u(drw/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑδρ-ών</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n106494.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the month in which Aquarius rises,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
